administration and technical support. Adept at managing IT infrastructure, troubleshooting technical issues, and

technologies. Passionate about leveraging technology to drive business success and enhance user experience. Seeking
opportunities to contribute expertise in IT System Administrator, IT Support Specialist, DevOps Engineer, Cloud
Infrastructure Expert, IT Technical Specialist/Expert roles.

Spotter(Site Safety Assistant): Working site Google Datacenter LPP6-A, Hamina
❖ Served as a dedicated spotter for MEWPs, heavy machinery, cranes, and trucks, ensuring safe and efficient

structures.
❖ Managed site safety protocols by setting up and maintaining barriers and exclusion zones around work areas.

incidents.

expansion.

large-scale infrastructure deployment.
From May to December 2025, I was an integral part of the LPP6A expansion project at Google Hamina. Working
through Lisapalvelu/DECO Engineering, I supported electrical teams in a technical spotter capacity. This role gave me
unique insight into the site’s physical infrastructure, safety culture, and the complex engineering required to build
Google-class data centers.
